columns.name: contentsId
columns.definition: contentsId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL

columns.name: metadataId
columns.definition: metadataId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL

columns.name: date
columns.definition: date INTEGER AS Date NOT NULL

columns.name: hasDraft
columns.definition: hasDraft INTEGER AS Boolean NOT NULL

queries.name: insert
queries.sql: INSERT OR REPLACE INTO CrossRef(metadataId, contentsId) VALUES ?;

queries.name: delete
queries.sql: DELETE FROM CrossRef WHERE metadataId = :id;

queries.name: deleteMultiple
queries.sql: DELETE FROM CrossRef WHERE metadataId IN ?;

queries.name: get
queries.sql: SELECT * FROM CrossRef WHERE metadataId = :id;

queries.name: getMultiple
queries.sql: SELECT * FROM CrossRef WHERE metadataId IN ?;

queries.name: update
queries.sql: INSERT OR REPLACE INTO NoteContents(contentsId, text, draftText) VALUES ?;

queries.name: insert
queries.sql: INSERT OR REPLACE INTO NoteContents(text, draftText) VALUES ?;

queries.name: delete
queries.sql: DELETE FROM NoteContents WHERE contentsId = :id;

queries.name: deleteMultiple
queries.sql: DELETE FROM NoteContents WHERE contentsId IN ?;

queries.name: get
queries.sql: SELECT * FROM NoteContents WHERE contentsId = :id;

queries.name: getMultiple
queries.sql: SELECT * FROM NoteContents WHERE contentsId IN ?;

queries.name: getIndex
queries.sql: SELECT last_insert_rowid();

queries.name: update
queries.sql: INSERT OR REPLACE INTO NoteMetadata(metadataId, title, date, hasDraft) VALUES ?;

queries.name: insert
queries.sql: INSERT OR REPLACE INTO NoteMetadata(title, date, hasDraft) VALUES ?;

queries.name: delete
queries.sql: DELETE FROM NoteMetadata WHERE metadataId = :id;

queries.name: deleteMultiple
queries.sql: DELETE FROM NoteMetadata WHERE metadataId IN ?;

queries.name: getUnsorted
queries.sql: SELECT * FROM NoteMetadata;

queries.name: getSortedByDateDescending
queries.sql: SELECT * FROM NoteMetadata ORDER BY date DESC;

queries.name: getSortedByDateAscending
queries.sql: SELECT * FROM NoteMetadata ORDER BY date ASC;

queries.name: get
queries.sql: SELECT * FROM NoteMetadata WHERE metadataId = :id;

queries.name: getDraftId
queries.sql: SELECT metadataId FROM NoteMetadata WHERE hasDraft = 1;

queries.name: getIndex
queries.sql: SELECT last_insert_rowid();

risk_notes: Standalone editor accepts external text/plain via VIEW, EDIT, SEND, AUTO_SEND.
Storage access is mediated through FSAF / Storage Access Framework helper.
Launcher alias preserves legacy public class name.

compile_risks: Android Gradle Plugin 8.11.2 may require modern Gradle/JDK support.
SQLDelight 1.5.5 with Kotlin 2.2.20 may need compatibility verification.
integration_risks: Exported activity aliases must be reviewed before embedding or exposing integration actions.
External text import accepts ACTION_SEND, ACTION_EDIT, ACTION_VIEW, AUTO_SEND.
FSAF dependency name is intentionally hostile/upstream naming; review vendor policy before public productization.
Release signing reads KSTOREFILE/KSTOREPWD/KEYALIAS/KEYPWD environment variables.
allowBackup=true may be acceptable for vanilla notes app but should be policy-reviewed.
safe_properties: Database schema is simple and local.

recommended_next_actions: Decide whether to keep activity aliases exported.
Decide package/applicationId strategy before forked build.
Decide whether storage import/export remains enabled.
Then run compile in external build workspace.
